_publications._publicationTitle: Structural and functional analyses of a germline KRAS T50I mutation provide insights into Raf activation.

_contextSnippet: we performed CRISPR/Cas9 gene editing to generate independent MOLM-13 single-cell clones characterized by biallelic frameshift KRAS mutations and loss of K-Ras protein expression
details: Successfully detected loss of K-Ras protein expression in CRISPR/Cas9 gene edited MOLM-13 single-cell clones with biallelic frameshift KRAS mutations
